# Mini chapter

## Early assessment
Early assessment should follow the original order and keep the key observation sequence.
Sentinel Pathway remains a tracked term in this chapter.

## Drug Tariff
The Drug Tariff label is market-specific and should not be treated as a universal standard.

## Custom UK Tool
Custom UK Tool is kept here as a UK reference tool in the original book.

Figure 1.1 Airway algorithm
1. Open the airway.
2. Assess breathing.
